intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, and used canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-31. Birthday search across /10_entities/cast showed the earliest upcoming month-day after 03-31 is 04-25, and /10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms the exact name as Claudia Reiter with birthday 1981-04-25. A targeted search for 04-25 found only claudia.md, so there is no tie.
